sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67055" key="metaxrw/nnumi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεταχρώννῡμι</orth>, <sense id="n67055.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">change the colour of</tr_> a thing, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
